Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Coastal Credit Union Music Park at Walnut Creek
Raleigh, NC
Previous Names:
Hardee's Walnut Creek Amphitheatre (Changed after 1998)
Alltel Pavilion at Walnut Creek (Changed after 2007)
Walnut Creek Amphitheatre (Changed after 2008)
Time Warner Cable Music Pavilion at Walnut Creek (Changed after 2013)
Walnut Creek Amphitheatre (Changed after 2016)
Seating Capacity: 20000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 26
  DMB  (24)
  Dave & Tim  (2)

Longest Performance:
06.16.95 - You Enjoy Myself (25:00)

Song Liberations
  7.23.21 – Sweet (after 2140 days)
  7.23.21 – So Damn Lucky (after 1127 days)
  7.23.21 – Hello Again (after 1055 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Alltel Pavilion, located southeast of Raleigh, NC, consists of 7,000 reserved seats and a 13,000 capacity lawn.

DMB's first show here was also their first H.O.R.D.E. show in 1993 (setlist unknown). 7.26.95 was probably the most memorable show here, David Ryan Harris guested on an epic, 21 minute version of All Along the Watchtower. 6.20.97 was the last time Let You Down was played full band. The 1998 Summer Tour's closing show 8.30.98 featured a top notch version of Recently, complete with the Pretty Girl outro.

Songs that made their live debuts at this venue:
Hold Me Down on 7.26.95.
Waste on 4.28.01.
